name: 2500mAh USB Rechargeable Hand-Free Neck Fan with 3-Speed Adjustment, Portable Mini Dual Head Rotatable Cooling Fan for Office, Reading, Travel, Outdoor Sports
description: ※DOUBLE HEADED 3 SPEED CONTROL DESIGN: Hands Free Neck Fan Double Headed design, Wearable Face Cooling, Personal Small Fan Easily toggle between high, medium, and low speeds as needed with a simple button control located directly on the fan unit. ※STAY COOL IN STYLE: Compact yet powerful fan keeps you cooler during activities while weighing only 110g for comfortable all-day wear. ※WEAR IT YOUR WAY: Adjustable Personal fan design allows wearing around the neck, attached to clothing, or held in hand for personalized cooling wherever you are. ※ALL-DAY ALL-PURPOSE PERFORMANCE: Versatile fan keeps you comfortable whether at work, school, outdoor events, or on the go to beat the heat rain or shine. ❉【SPORTS NECK FAN WEARABLE 】- This creative neck fan can be hung around your neck and for a more convenient job. The dual fan head neck fan has a 360° flexible rotation and design 3 speed adjustment a more powerful airflow to enhance air circulation. ❉【USB RECHARGEABLE DESIGN 】-The Neck fan Has a Built-in 2500 mAh Super Long Life Rechargeable Battery,The fan Blade is a Seven-Leaf Design,Which Can Be Quickly Charged Through USB,Neck fan Has Three Working Modes: Low/12 Hours, Mid/8 Hours, And High /6 Hours.Press The Power Button To Adjust, Simple Operation。 ❉【UPGRADED VERSION PERSONAL PORTABLE USB FAN 】- The portable neck fan is made of environmentally friendly ABS fireproof material. Each fan head combines 7 bionic fan blades to make the blade softer, more durable and quieter. Transmit more wind for you. ❉【NECK FAN SMALL SIZE,STRONG PERFORMANCE】- Weighing only 6.5 ounces, you can put it in a handbag or hang it around your neck.suitable for various outdoor activities.Before using the wearable sports neck fan, long hair should be tied up to avoid being caught by the fan head. ❉【The right way to use the neck fan】: to prolong the battery life and prevent the battery from losing power during transportation and storage resulting in failure to turn on, we recommend that after you receive the neck fan Please charge for 30 minutes before starting .any problems during use, please contact us, we will help you to solve the problem so you can have a good shopping experience.
